case_title: MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. VS EDWARDS, DOROTHY J.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DOROTHY J.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.18 FILED BY MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DOROTHY J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DOROTHY J. $200.18 PRINCIPAL, $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $267.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $402.51 AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DOROTHY J.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2.23 ACCRUED INTEREST, $97.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DOROTHY J.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DOROTHY J.
